calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2014 Off Calendar

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Oct-01-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN A. LOFTON OF LPS LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 957-1800 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. SARAH POPPY ALEXANDER OF ROSEN & GRUNFELD LLP, TEL. NO. 433-6830 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PAULA HERTEL's APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER as to AgeSong Inc. is denied. Plaintiff has failed to identify the existence of a contract between the parties obligating Defendant's payment of any amount in deferred compensation, and has therefore failed to establish that the claim upon which the attachment is sought is one upon which an attachment may be issued. (CCP 484.090(a)(1).) The December 2011 emails between Plaintiff and Defendant do not amount to a legally binding contract. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/eg

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Sep-22-2014 Continued To Oct-01-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF PAULA HERTEL's APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 1, 2014 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)
